issues.detail: Instructions lack explicit error handling and edge case coverage.
Guidelines and examples do not provide runnable code or concrete command sequences.

scenarios.name: Dynamic PostgreSQL credentials for a microservice
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for static KV storage and hardcoded tokens, contradicting the dynamic-credentials guidance; treatment uses Database engine, AppRole, Vault Agent sidecar, and short TTL as the skill prescribes.

scenarios.name: Encryption-as-a-service for sensitive user fields
scenarios.rationale: Baseline implements app-managed AES with keys in env vars, which the skill explicitly advises against; treatment uses transit/encrypt/<key> and transit/decrypt/<key> with rotation policy keeping old ciphertext decryptable.
